scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "SERVER,CLIENT,ADMIN" -c "magenta,cyan,yellow" "npm run server:dev" "npm run client" "npm run admin"
scripts.start: npm run build:client && npm run server
scripts.all: npm run install:all && npm run build:client && npm run server && npm run admin
